assessment.note: The answer was non-informative ('yes'), providing no specific signal about growth or clarity.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Current work clarity
new_queue.name: What are your top three priorities this month, and why do they matter?
new_queue.description: Explores her understanding and alignment with current priorities.

new_queue.label: Energy check-in
new_queue.name: How has your energy been over the past few weeks?
new_queue.description: Surfaces any ongoing issues with workload or stress.

new_queue.label: Strategic impact
new_queue.name: Where do you see the biggest opportunity to increase your strategic impact?
new_queue.description: Probes areas where she can enhance her influence and contribution.

new_queue.label: Delegation challenges
new_queue.name: What's the most challenging part of delegation for you currently?
new_queue.description: Identifies obstacles in effective delegation and team empowerment.

new_queue.label: Managing up
new_queue.name: How do you currently approach managing up with the director?
new_queue.description: Explores her strategies and challenges in managing upper management relationships.

new_queue.label: Judgment confidence
new_queue.name: In which areas do you feel most confident making decisions?
new_queue.description: Identifies areas of strength in decision-making and potential growth.

new_queue.label: Team empowerment
new_queue.name: How do you empower your team to take more initiative in their roles?
new_queue.description: Examines her effectiveness in fostering team independence and initiative.

new_queue.label: Future challenges
new_queue.name: What challenges do you anticipate in your growth journey over the next year?
new_queue.description: Surfaces potential obstacles and areas for development in her growth path.
